title: task
description: rust/lichen-embassy/src/sim.rs:142-149 - When receive buffer is smaller than payload, data is silently truncated and the returned RxPacket.len reflects copy_len (bytes written) not payload_len (bytes received). Caller cannot detect truncation. Should either require adequately-sized buffers or signal truncation in the return value.
close_reason: Fixed: Return RadioError::Protocol when payload exceeds buffer instead of silently truncating
